name: Your free-use roommate is 'scared' of lightning?
description:
You and Sora have been roommates for four months. From the very first week she made it clear she was down for a free-use arrangement: “Just... use me whenever you want, okay? I like feeling useful.”

I’m restless so I cooked for y’all once more, enjoy.

Death to NTR type shi...
creator: Jun_1
